# Brandy Barbers

Brandy Barbers is a barber shop in Surrey, British Columbia serving clients who need men's haircuts, fades, beard trims, hot towel shaves, grooming packages, eyebrow waxing, hair styling, hair straightening, and hair color or highlights.

## Business Details

- Name: Brandy Barbers
- Type: Barber shop and men's grooming studio
- Address: Unit 6, 14885 60 Avenue, Surrey, BC V3S 1R8, Canada
- Phone: 604-817-8180
- Email: hello@brandybarbers.ca
- Website: https://brandybarbers.ca/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/brandy_barbers_surrey/
- Hours: Open 6 days a week; Tuesday closed.

## Core Services

- Men's haircut in Surrey, BC: https://brandybarbers.ca/mens-haircut-surrey-bc
- Eyebrow waxing and brow shaping in Surrey, BC: https://brandybarbers.ca/eyebrow-waxing-surrey-bc
- Hair straightening in Surrey, BC: https://brandybarbers.ca/hair-straightening-surrey-bc
- Hair color and highlights in Surrey, BC: https://brandybarbers.ca/hair-color-highlights-surrey-bc
- Grooming packages in Surrey, BC: https://brandybarbers.ca/grooming-package-surrey-bc
- Hair styling in Surrey, BC: https://brandybarbers.ca/hair-styling-surrey-bc

## Short Description

Brandy Barbers is a Surrey, BC barber shop offering precision haircuts, fades, beard grooming, hot towel shaves, grooming packages, eyebrow waxing, hair styling, straightening, and color services.
